title: Disease N' Decease
description: This mod makes you feel sick literally!
body:
Are you sick of not being sick in Minecraft? Well now, player can officially become sick with our brand new diseases in Disease N' Decease! Just make sure to cure them on time then everything will be just fine.

![Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ba89638e46a2024039023f13c027248bfd0e36.png)
# Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Anemia

- Anemia stop entities from healing.
- Entity can get Anemia from touching Virelyss Bush.
- Virelyss Bush can be found in Plains and Sunflower Plains.

2. Bloomlung

- Bloomlung damage entities unless they are not breathing like while they are swimming.
- Bloomlung doesn't deal much damage but it will deal 16 damages when the effect run out of time.
- Entity can get Bloomlung from stepping or breaking Bloom Blossom.
- Bloom Blossom can be found in Swamp, Jungle and Dark Forest biomes.

3. Virelyss

- Virelyss can be harvested from Virelyss Bush.
- Virelyss Bush act like Sweet Berry Bush but it also gives entities Anemia.
- Antidote Powder can cure every diseases.
- Antidote Powder can be crafted with 2 Virelyss.

</details>

More features are coming soon every week!

![Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ba89638e46a2024039023f13c027248bfd0e36.png)
